text: In this study, the impact of the availability of technological devices on the academic success of students living in the province of Denizli was investigated. Within the scope of the study, the relationship between students’ academic success and the variables of mobile phone, mobile internet, computer at home, internet at home and the number of TVs in the home were examined by means of the attendance tests held for the first five evaluation stages. According to the parametric analysis methods applied to the data, it was determined that there was a positive relationship between the academic success of students and the availability of technological devices at home. According to the findings of the study, it was determined that the students who had computers at home and permanent internet in their homes had higher academic achievements than other students.
